_comment_target: ES2020 gives modern JS features while staying compatible with Node runtimes.
_comment_module: CommonJS matches Node.js default module system for backend code.
_comment_rootDir: Source code lives in src so the compiler knows where to start.
_comment_outDir: Compiled JS will be emitted to dist for clean build output.
_comment_esModuleInterop: Improves compatibility with CommonJS packages like express.
_comment_strict: Strict mode catches type issues early for safer production code.
